meta.title: TV PPTX Viewer – Fast PPTX Reader for Android Phones & Tablets
meta.description: Fast TV PPTX Viewer for Android phones and tablets with search, bookmarks, read aloud, OCR fallback, night mode, thumbnails, zoom, print, share, and password-protected PPTX support.
meta.keywords: TV PPTX Viewer, Android TV PPTX Viewer, PPTX reader Android, PPTX opener, PPTX search app, PPTX bookmarks, read aloud PPTX, OCR PPTX reader, TV PPTX Viewer for phone, TV PPTX Viewer for tablet, night mode PPTX, password PPTX reader
meta.author: Deepak PK

og.title: TV PPTX Viewer for Android Phones & Tablets
og.description: Open, search, bookmark, listen to, print, and share PPTXs on Android phones and tablets with a fast modern PPTX reader.

twitter.title: TV PPTX Viewer for Android Phones & Tablets
twitter.description: Fast Android PPTX reader with search, bookmarks, read aloud, OCR fallback, night mode, thumbnails, zoom, print, and share.

product.name: TV PPTX Viewer
product.heroTitle: TV PPTX Viewer – Fast PPTX Reader for Android Phones & Tablets
product.heroDescription: Open PPTX files from your phone, file manager, downloads, email attachments, or shared links. Search, bookmark, zoom, listen with read aloud, use OCR fallback for scanned pages, and continue from where you stopped.

features.title: Features Built for Android PPTX Reading

cards.title: Open PPTXs Anywhere
bullets: Open PPTX files from the app picker
Open PPTXs from file managers and external apps
Persist read access for SAF document URIs
Unlock password-protected PPTX files

cards.title: Recent Files & Resume
bullets: Recent files library with first-page thumbnails
Search recent files by name
Resume reading from the last page
Restore previous zoom level automatically

cards.title: Smooth Reading Controls
bullets: Smooth PPTX page rendering with lazy loading
Nearby-page high-resolution preloading
Pinch-to-zoom and double-tap zoom
Go to any page instantly

cards.title: Powerful PPTX Search
bullets: Search text inside PPTX documents
View result snippets with highlighted matches
Navigate quickly between search results
Find important content faster in long PPTXs

cards.title: Bookmarks & Thumbnails
bullets: Bookmark important PPTX pages
View bookmark thumbnails
Use thumbnail strip navigation
Remove recent files with confirmation

cards.title: Read Aloud with OCR
bullets: Listen with play, pause, previous, next, and stop controls
Tap to start reading from a selected word or sentence
Adjust speech rate, pitch, and voice
Use OCR fallback for scanned or image-only pages

cards.title: Comfort Reading Tools
bullets: Night mode for low-light reading
Margin crop for cleaner page viewing
Header, footer, and page number skipping during read aloud
Simple multi-column reading order detection

cards.title: Share, Print & Subscriptions
bullets: Share PPTX files from the app
Print PPTX files when supported by your device
Free preview experience with subscription unlock
Offline subscription cache with grace period

items.title: Students & Learners
items.text: Read notes, books, assignments, and study material with search, bookmarks, thumbnails, and read aloud support.

items.title: Professionals
items.text: Review reports, invoices, forms, manuals, and office documents with fast navigation and resume reading.

items.title: Everyday Readers
items.text: Open personal PPTXs, eBooks, manuals, and downloaded documents in a clean, comfortable reader.

items.title: Hands-Free Reading
items.text: Use read aloud, voice controls, and OCR fallback to listen to supported PPTXs and scanned pages.

items.q: How do I open PPTX files in TV PPTX Viewer?
items.a: You can open PPTX files from the app picker, file managers, downloads, email attachments, shared links, and other external apps.

items.q: Does the app remember where I stopped reading?
items.a: Yes. TV PPTX Viewer can restore your recent files, reading progress, last page, and zoom level.

items.q: Can I search inside PPTX files?
items.a: Yes. The app supports in-document text search with result snippets, highlighted matches, and quick result navigation.

items.q: Does read aloud work with scanned PPTXs?
items.a: Read aloud works best with PPTXs that contain selectable text. For scanned or image-only pages, OCR fallback helps detect text when supported.
Yes. TV PPTX Viewer supports unlocking password-protected PPTX files.
TV PPTX Viewer includes a free preview experience. Subscription options are available to unlock full-document viewing and extended reading access.
